items.title: CONTRACT FOR 04 X 500T SELF PROPELLED FUEL BARGES FOR INDIAN NAVY WITH M/S SHOFT SHIPYARD PRIVATE LIMITED, THANE
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Defence CONTRACT FOR 04 X 500T SELF PROPELLED FUEL BARGES FOR INDIAN NAVY WITH M/S SHOFT SHIPYARD PRIVATE LIMITED, THANE Posted On: 03 MAR 2026 12:55PM by PIB Delhi A contract for construction of 04 X 500T Self Propelled Fuel Barges has been concluded with M/s Shoft Shipyard Private Limited, Thane (MSME Shipyard) on 02 Mar 2026 . items.title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah says let us reaffirm Bharat’s timeless ethos of living in harmony with nature on World Wild life Day
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Home Affairs Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah says let us reaffirm Bharat’s timeless ethos of living in harmony with nature on World Wild life Day From the majestic tiger to the smallest species, every life form sustains our ecological balance The day strengthens the nation’s resolve to protect and preserve wildlife for generations to co…
